gap_summaries: [ultrathink] FIXED — Task 10 originally provided two versions of advance_node_state, the first calling status.with_node(...).__class__(...) which discards with_node's result and rebuilds. Implementer reading sequentially could apply both. Removed the buggy version; only the clean replace()-based form remains.

[ultrathink] FIXED — LifecyclePolicy had no to_dict() method; spec acceptance 'schema validates + round-trips' was asymmetric (load-only). Added to_dict() emitting on-disk schema shape with field order preserved.
[ultrathink] FIXED — No policy file round-trip test. Added test_file_round_trip_via_to_dict in Task 4 that writes loaded.to_dict() back as JSON and confirms reload yields an equal LifecyclePolicy.

[ultrathink] FIXED — load_lifecycle_status didn't validate that nodes[map_key].node_id == map_key; hand-edited corruption (impostor node_id) would slip through. Added expected_key check and test_node_id_field_must_match_map_key.

[ultrathink] FIXED — Missing byte-equal status round-trip determinism test. Added test_byte_equal_round_trip_for_diff_determinism asserting write→read→write yields identical bytes for diff review reliability.
[ultrathink] FIXED — Missing empty-policy edge case for scheduler. Added test_empty_policy_returns_empty_tuple covering topo_sort and select_runnable on zero-node input.
[ultrathink] FIXED — Missing purity test for select_runnable. Added test_inputs_not_mutated + test_two_calls_return_byte_equal_tuples to pin the pure-functional contract.

[ultrathink] FIXED — select_runnable silently skips policy nodes absent from status.nodes; contract was undocumented. Updated docstring to make 'runner bootstraps PENDING records' contract explicit, added test_node_in_policy_but_missing_from_status_is_silently_skipped pinning the behavior.
[ultrathink] FIXED — Unused 'field' import in lifecycle_policy.py and lifecycle_status.py stubs would trip ruff F401. Trimmed stub imports to actually-used symbols (dataclass, replace).

[ultrathink] DEFERRED — validate_lifecycle_policy doesn't check that every input_artifact id resolves to some node's output_artifact. Spec is silent on external vs node-produced artifacts; M02 design call. Documented as known gap.

[ultrathink] DEFERRED — Entry-mode references don't enforce that target node's modes list includes the corresponding entry mode (e.g., entry.greenfield -> node.modes must contain 'greenfield'). Defer to M04 entry-router milestone.
[ultrathink] MINOR — NodeState wire form 'awaiting_approval' (underscore) vs spec text 'awaiting-approval' (dash). Plan acknowledges in Task 18; documented as wire-form contract.
[ultrathink] MINOR — StatusLoadError name stretches to cover transition rejections in advance_node_state. Cleaner alternative (StatusError parent) deferred to keep the rename out of M01.
[ultrathink] MINOR — load_lifecycle_policy uses except (TypeError, ValueError) then re-raises via isinstance(PolicyLoadError) check; works but reads awkwardly.
[ultrathink] MINOR — Bridge fixture is the only substantive scheduler fixture; spec says 'fixtures' (plural). Inline test cases compensate but a parallel-roots fixture would tighten coverage.
[ultrathink] MINOR — write_lifecycle_status passes OSError from mkdir/parent unwritable straight through (not wrapped in StatusLoadError). Operators want raw OSError detail; acceptable trade-off.
[ultrathink] MINOR — iso_now() has second resolution; two state changes within a second produce identical updated_at strings. Loses sub-second ordering but acceptable.
[ultrathink] MINOR — topo_sort cycle-detection branch is defensive-only (validate_lifecycle_policy already rejects cycles at load). Doc string explains the dual-check rationale.
[ultrathink] MINOR — LifecycleStatus uses dict[str, NodeRecord] (no frozen-dict primitive in stdlib). Callers could mutate the dict directly; copy-on-write methods substitute.
[ultrathink] MINOR — Phase parse error messages are generic (wrapped via f'policy parse failed: {exc}'). Underlying exception detail is preserved via __cause__ chain.
